step_by_step_thinking:
The fourth-generation apex locator typically utilizes multiple frequency ratios to determine tooth length, offering greater accuracy compared to earlier models. This advanced technology helps reduce errors associated with variations in tissue resistance or impedance alone.

My answer is D: Multiple frequency ratio.
